parameters.jsCode:
// One item per pin. Edit, add, or remove freely.
// To run a subset, comment out items or filter the returned array.
// Tune pexelsQuery — specific proper nouns beat generic terms (e.g.
// 'Vietnam Halong Bay rice terraces' >> 'Vietnam').
const pins = [
  {
    slug: 'japan-photo',
    title: 'JAPAN',
    tagline: "A traveler's 8-section guide",
    bullet1: 'History & geography',
    bullet2: 'Politics & economy',
    bullet3: 'Society & culture',
    bullet4: 'Travel prep checklist',
    cta: 'Read the full profile →',
    urlHint: 'travelnow • countries/japan',
    pexelsQuery: 'Japan Kyoto temple sunrise',
    siteUrl: 'https://kytriples.github.io/travel-now-agent/countries/japan/'
  },
  {
    slug: 'vietnam-photo',
    title: 'VIETNAM',
    tagline: "A traveler's country profile",
    bullet1: 'Geography & climate',
    bullet2: 'Modern economy',
    bullet3: 'Food & street culture',
    bullet4: 'Travel prep checklist',
    cta: 'Read the full profile →',
    urlHint: 'travelnow • countries/vietnam',
    pexelsQuery: 'Vietnam Halong Bay rice terraces',
    siteUrl: 'https://kytriples.github.io/travel-now-agent/countries/vietnam/'
  },
  {
    slug: 'australia-photo',
    title: 'AUSTRALIA',
    tagline: "A layered country profile",
    bullet1: 'History & geography',
    bullet2: 'Politics & economy',
    bullet3: 'Society & culture',
    bullet4: 'Travel prep checklist',
    cta: 'Read the full profile →',
    urlHint: 'travelnow • countries/australia',
    pexelsQuery: 'Sydney Opera House harbor sunset',
    siteUrl: 'https://kytriples.github.io/travel-now-agent/countries/australia/'
  },
  {
    slug: 'tokyo-photo',
    title: 'TOKYO',
    tagline: "A layered guide to the city",
    bullet1: 'History & neighborhoods',
    bullet2: 'Modern districts',
    bullet3: 'Food & culture',
    bullet4: 'Practical prep',
    cta: 'Read the full guide →',
    urlHint: 'travelnow • cities/tokyo',
    pexelsQuery: 'Tokyo Shibuya crossing neon night',
    siteUrl: 'https://kytriples.github.io/travel-now-agent/cities/tokyo/'
  },
  {
    slug: 'asakusa-photo',
    title: 'ASAKUSA',
    tagline: "A historic Tokyo neighborhood guide",
    bullet1: 'Sensoji temple history',
    bullet2: 'Edo-era streets',
    bullet3: 'Practical visit tips',
    bullet4: 'Nearby districts',
    cta: 'Read the neighborhood guide →',
    urlHint: 'travelnow • cities/tokyo/asakusa',
    pexelsQuery: 'Asakusa Sensoji temple lantern Tokyo',
    siteUrl: 'https://kytriples.github.io/travel-now-agent/cities/tokyo/asakusa.html'
  },
  {
    slug: 'airport-liquids-photo',
    title: '100 ML',
    tagline: 'Airport security liquids made simple',
    bullet1: '100ml rule basics',
    bullet2: 'Clear plastic bag tips',
    bullet3: 'Common rejections',
    bullet4: 'Quick FAQ',
    cta: 'Read the checklist →',
    urlHint: 'travelnow • airport-security-liquids',
    pexelsQuery: 'airport security carry-on bag tray check',
    siteUrl: 'https://kytriples.github.io/travel-now-agent/articles/airport-security-liquids.html'
  },
  {
    slug: 'carry-on-photo',
    title: 'CARRY-ON',
    tagline: 'Pack in the order security expects',
    bullet1: 'Liquids on top',
    bullet2: 'Laptop accessible',
    bullet3: 'Passport in pocket',
    bullet4: 'Charger logic',
    cta: 'Read the prep guide →',
    urlHint: 'travelnow • airport-security-packing',
    pexelsQuery: 'airport security checkpoint x-ray belt',
    siteUrl: 'https://kytriples.github.io/travel-now-agent/articles/airport-security-packing-moments.html'
  },
  {
    slug: 'beach-photo',
    title: 'BEACH',
    tagline: 'What to pack for tropical destinations',
    bullet1: 'Reef-safe sunscreen',
    bullet2: 'Packable sun hats',
    bullet3: 'Quick-dry towels',
    bullet4: 'Forgotten essentials',
    cta: 'Read the checklist →',
    urlHint: 'travelnow • beach-trip-packing',
    pexelsQuery: 'tropical beach palm trees turquoise water',
    siteUrl: 'https://kytriples.github.io/travel-now-agent/articles/beach-trip-packing-checklist.html'
  },
  {
    slug: 'boat-day-photo',
    title: 'BOAT DAY',
    tagline: 'Rent a boat without a sailing license',
    bullet1: 'UK, Italy, France rules',
    bullet2: 'Spain, Croatia, Greece',
    bullet3: 'Platforms & costs',
    bullet4: 'What to bring',
    cta: 'Read the full guide →',
    urlHint: 'travelnow • charter-a-boat-for-a-day',
    pexelsQuery: 'Mediterranean sailing boat coast turquoise',
    siteUrl: 'https://kytriples.github.io/travel-now-agent/articles/charter-a-boat-for-a-day.html'
  },
  {
    slug: 'esim-photo',
    title: 'eSIM',
    tagline: 'International data, no SIM tray',
    bullet1: 'Phone compatibility',
    bullet2: 'Choosing a data plan',
    bullet3: 'Offline backup tips',
    bullet4: 'Pre-flight checklist',
    cta: 'Read the setup guide →',
    urlHint: 'travelnow • esim-activation',
    pexelsQuery: 'smartphone airplane window seat travel',
    siteUrl: 'https://kytriples.github.io/travel-now-agent/articles/esim-activation-and-preparation.html'
  },
  {
    slug: 'travel-edc-photo',
    title: 'TRAVEL EDC',
    tagline: 'Pocket essentials for trip days',
    bullet1: 'Power bank',
    bullet2: 'Water bottle',
    bullet3: 'Hand sanitizer',
    bullet4: 'Small cash',
    cta: 'Read the checklist →',
    urlHint: 'travelnow • everyday-carry-essentials',
    pexelsQuery: 'travel essentials flat lay backpack items',
    siteUrl: 'https://kytriples.github.io/travel-now-agent/articles/everyday-carry-essentials-for-travel.html'
  },
  {
    slug: 'hotels-photo',
    title: 'HOTELS',
    tagline: 'Which booking site for your trip',
    bullet1: 'Hotels.com vs Booking',
    bullet2: 'Trip.com & Agoda',
    bullet3: 'HotelsCombined logic',
    bullet4: 'Common booking mistakes',
    cta: 'Read the comparison →',
    urlHint: 'travelnow • hotel-booking-sites',
    pexelsQuery: 'hotel lobby modern interior architecture',
    siteUrl: 'https://kytriples.github.io/travel-now-agent/articles/hotel-booking-sites-comparison.html'
  },
  {
    slug: 'untranslatable-photo',
    title: '14 WORDS',
    tagline: 'Concepts that resist translation',
    bullet1: 'Saudade, Hygge, Wabi-sabi',
    bullet2: 'Why they resist English',
    bullet3: 'What linguists say',
    bullet4: 'What travelers take home',
    cta: 'Read the full essay →',
    urlHint: 'travelnow • untranslatable-words',
    pexelsQuery: 'open old book library window light',
    siteUrl: 'https://kytriples.github.io/travel-now-agent/articles/untranslatable-words.html'
  },
  {
    slug: 'etiquette-photo',
    title: 'ETIQUETTE',
    tagline: 'Cultural rules across 12 countries',
    bullet1: 'Face & politeness theory',
    bullet2: 'Greeting conventions',
    bullet3: 'Dining manners',
    bullet4: 'Public space norms',
    cta: 'Read the cultural guide →',
    urlHint: 'travelnow • what-counts-as-rude',
    pexelsQuery: 'Tokyo street pedestrians morning commute',
    siteUrl: 'https://kytriples.github.io/travel-now-agent/articles/what-counts-as-rude.html'
  }
];
return pins.map(json => ({ json }));

nodes.name: Render pin
nodes.notes: Calls local pin_server.py (started separately: `python3 pin_server.py`). Server invokes generate_pin.py, which uses PEXELS_API_KEY from .env.

nodes.name: Post to Pinterest (disabled)
nodes.notes:
Enable after:
1) Pinterest Developer app approved → Bearer token saved as Header Auth credential
2) PNGs are committed + pushed (so GitHub Pages serves them publicly)
3) Replace YOUR_BOARD_ID_HERE with your actual board id
